No Poverty.reason: The course content does not address poverty eradication or related economic vulnerabilities.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The mention of 'psychological acoustics' is a technical topic about sound perception, not directly related to health promotion or well-being targets, warranting only a minimal inferred score.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and equips students with technical and vocational skills for employment in the audio industry (Target 4.4).
